states.name: Zeus
states.title: God of Absolute Dominion
states.description: Zeus, the one and only god—In a world where gods and humans coexisted, she stood as the absolute authority. Though at times willful and tyrannical, her overwhelming power made her rule unshakable. And the people placed their trust in her.

states.name: Zeus
states.title: God of Absolute Dominion
states.description: However... one day, gods from another world invaded Zeus's realm. Zeus put her life on the line, fighting to protect her people. But alone, she could not hold them off, and in time the people began to show open disappointment in her. As scorn rained down upon her, Zeus realized that she had never been loved by her people after all.

states.name: Zeus
states.title: God of Absolute Dominion
states.description:
Even in that darkest moment, there was one woman who remained at Zeus's side. Though rebellious and always making snide remarks, she declared that she would believe in her till the very end.
Is this what they call true love? If even this woman were to betray me... then...
